---
species: "Dumontia contorta"
accepted_code: "DUCO"
alternate_codes: "" 
diminutive: "" 
alternate_diminutives: "" 
common_name: "Tubular weed"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "flat cylinders" 
image: '/header_images/Dumontia_contorta.jpg'
image_credit: 'Photo from Józef Wiktor & Agnieszka Tatarek via [WORMS](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=image&pic=9680&tid=145228)'
categories:
  - green algae
  - erect red algae
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_swath
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 145228 
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** can grow >5cm, soft, slippery and fragile, noodle like appearance, prefers upper to mid intertidal zone -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

**[WORMS page](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=145228)**
